title: Recent Jump in Reported Dry Bulk Spot Cargoes
section_path: Recent Jump in Reported Dry Bulk Spot Cargoes
section_path_text: Recent Jump in Reported Dry Bulk Spot Cargoes
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Overall dry bulk spot freight rates decreased last week, with only handysize rates rising. However, with China on holiday last week, the decline in rates was not at all surprising. More surprising was that spot cargo volume was strong last week.
